summary: Comprehensive frontend testing of Smart Matchmaking UI edits on Video Analysis page (/analysis/v-seed-1). All new features working correctly: idle state with 'Start Matching' button, loading state with rotating text, done state with cards, tab switching resets to idle, real badminton player photos (not cartoon avatars), circular avatars with object-cover, locked/unlocked cards, and toast notifications.
critical_code_review_comments: All data-testid attributes properly implemented for testing
Real badminton player photos correctly stored at /assets/match-player-{1,2,3,4}.png
Tab switching properly resets state to idle
seed_data_creation: None - uses mock data from fixtures.js
context_for_next_testing_agent: Smart Matchmaking UI edits fully tested. Key test IDs: smart-matchmaking-section, matchmaking-idle, matchmaking-loading, matchmaking-scroll-container, start-matching-btn, tab-find-coach, tab-find-player, coach-match-card-mc-{1-6}, player-match-card-mp-{1-6}, book-coach-mc-{1-3}, challenge-player-mp-{1-3}. Avatar images use /assets/match-player-{1,2,3,4}.png with circular shape (border-radius: 9999px) and object-cover.

features_tested.idle_state_coach_tab: PASS - Section starts in idle state with 'Find coaches tailored to your weaknesses' text and 'Find My Ideal Coach' button
features_tested.idle_state_player_tab: PASS - Player tab shows 'Discover players that match your skill level' text and 'Find Matching Players' button
features_tested.loading_state_with_rotating_text: PASS - Loading spinner appears with rotating text messages for ~2.5s
features_tested.done_state_coach_cards: PASS - Coach cards appear after loading with real player photos
features_tested.done_state_player_cards: PASS - Player cards appear after loading with real player photos
features_tested.tab_switching_resets_to_idle: PASS - Switching tabs resets state to idle
features_tested.real_player_photos: PASS - Avatar images use /assets/match-player-{1,2,3,4}.png (not cartoon avatars)
features_tested.circular_avatars_object_cover: PASS - Avatars are circular (border-radius: 9999px) with object-cover
features_tested.coach_cards_unlocked: PASS - 3 unlocked cards (mc-1, mc-2, mc-3) with 'Book Now' button
features_tested.coach_cards_locked: PASS - 3 locked cards (mc-4, mc-5, mc-6) with 'Go Premium' blur overlay
features_tested.player_cards_unlocked: PASS - 3 unlocked cards (mp-1, mp-2, mp-3) with 'Challenge to Match' button
features_tested.player_cards_locked: PASS - 3 locked cards (mp-4, mp-5, mp-6) with 'Go Premium' blur overlay
features_tested.book_now_toast: PASS - Toast notification 'Booking request sent to {coach name}!' appears
features_tested.challenge_to_match_toast: PASS - Toast notification 'Challenge sent to {player name}!' appears
